svg.title: reeve full architecture
svg.desc: Complete reeve architecture: operators and CI author through the API; a reeve-server tier containing SQLite, secrets vault, durability, render engine, rollouts, and device channels behind one port; an object store receiving ciphertext snapshots; an optional zot image cache; and devices running reeve-agent pulling manifests, bundles, and secrets. The server tier repeats per gateway; all communication leaves the initiator.

g.text: one port: ui · api · manifest poll · OCI (/v2) · sse · websocket

svg.text: tier repeats — gateway = same binary, upstream set

g.text: agent.db journal · applied/ copy · crash-only convergence

svg.text: arrows leave the initiator — devices and gateways pull · operators push intent · the server ships only ciphertext
